title: linaria spuria subsp. elatiniflora
intro: Linaria spuria subsp. elatiniflora, also known as the annual toadflax, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Plantaginaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Linaria spuria subsp. elatiniflora include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and aid in the treatment of various health conditions.
